# env.actions { #raccoon.env.actions }

`env.actions`

Action space utilities for OpenSpiel backgammon.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [legal_action_mask](#raccoon.env.actions.legal_action_mask) | Return a boolean mask of shape (1352,). True for legal actions. |

### legal_action_mask { #raccoon.env.actions.legal_action_mask }

```python
env.actions.legal_action_mask(legal_actions)
```

Return a boolean mask of shape (1352,). True for legal actions.
